channel.title: Veille métier du 2026-04-28

item.title: Survey on the Access to Finance of Enterprises: lending conditions tightened
item.description: The European Central Bank (ECB) is the central bank of the European Union countries which have adopted the euro. Our main task is to maintain price stability in the euro area and so preserve the purchasing power of the single currency. — Thématique finance ; source jugée fiable (ecb - press / speeches / interviews) ; information très récente.

item.title: Press release - 2027 EU budget: press conference with lead MEP on Tuesday at 13.30
item.description: Journalists are invited to a press conference with rapporteur Nils Ušakovs following the vote on Parliament's guidelines for the 2027 EU budget. item.title: Press release - AI: press conference debrief on the negotiations to update EU rules
item.description: On Wednesday at 11.00, lead MEPs Arba Kokalari and Michael McNamara will hold a press conference following Tuesday’s negotiations with the Council on the so-called AI “digital omnibus”. Committee on the Internal Market and Consumer Protection Committee on Civil Liberties, Justice and Home Affairs Source : © European Union, 2026 - EP — Thématique finance ; source jugée fiable (european parliament - press releases) ; impact marché.
